title: Change Asset View Filters
content:
# Change Asset View Filters

You can use Kelvin AI to quickly setup new filtered Asset Views through the prompt.

<iframe width="800" height="450" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/rkBpDGGUyHg?si=6h0FPfEvRmb8akLD" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Create New Asset View

To start, click on the **Kelvin AI** menu item.

You will see the popup like this;

Then type in your request like;

```
create a list of all assets in the pcp optimization application which are currently in closed loop mode.
```

The new UI view will be created and saved, then in the response you will be given a link button to go directly to this new view.

Click on the **Open New View** button.

When the page opens, you will see the list filtered as requested.

To confirm the filters, click on the view list and you will see a new entry called **Kelvin AI Prompt**.

Looking at the advanced filters you will also see all the filter settings you requested.
